🔄 From SEO to GEO

Match each SEO concept to its GEO equivalent

How to Play

Click an SEO concept on the left, then click its matching GEO equivalent on the right. Get all 6 matches to complete the challenge!

SEO
Ranking on a list
Optimize for position #1
1
Keywords
Compete on search terms
2
Backlinks
Build authority through links
3
Title tag
What matters for ranking
4
More content helps
Volume effect
5
Blue links
What buyers see
6
→
→
→
→
→
→
GEO
Schema markup
What matters for citation
4
Citation in a synthesis
Optimize for being quoted
1
Synthesized answer
What buyers see
6
Structured proof points
Build authority through data
3
Better structure helps
Quality over quantity
5
Entity authority
Compete on expertise signals
2
Matches: 0 / 6
